# Supported clients

The `install` harness writes the correct config for each host. Run
`datasynx-cartography list-clients` for the live list.

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED:clients START — regenerated by `npm run docs:clients` -->
| id | Host | Format | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `claude-code` | Claude Code | json | |
| `cursor` | Cursor | json | |
| `vscode` | VS Code (Copilot) | json | Uses the `servers` key (not `mcpServers`). |
| `codex` | Codex CLI | toml | Project scope only loads in "trusted" projects. |
| `windsurf` | Windsurf | json | |
| `cline` | Cline | json | |
| `roo` | Roo Code | json | Project `.roo/mcp.json` takes precedence. |
| `zed` | Zed | json | Manual servers need `"source": "custom"`. |
| `junie` | JetBrains / Junie | json | |
| `gemini` | Gemini CLI | json | |
| `goose` | Goose | yaml | Built-ins are left untouched. |
| `openhands` | OpenHands | toml | SHTTP preferred; SSE legacy. |
| `claude-desktop` | Claude Desktop | json | One-click via the `.mcpb` bundle. |
<!-- AUTO-GENERATED:clients END -->
